summary: Intel Q1 2026: revenue $13.58B (+7% YoY), data center AI up 22% to $5.05B — positive read-through for AMD EPYC. NVIDIA Q1 2026 data center revenue >$30B; Blackwell GPU dominance intact but faces 40% memory production cut. AMD positioned as preferred second supplier for cost-aware hyperscalers with OpenAI 6GW and Oracle 50k MI450 GPU commitments.
